zh.Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England: 英國素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Sackville於1494年出生在英國英格蘭素可時，她的父親Richard Sackville35歲，母親Isabel Digges30歲。她於1514年與Thomas Baker在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1557年在英國肯特享年63歲。

zh-hans.Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England: 英国素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Sackville于1494年出生在英国英格兰素可时，她的父亲Richard Sackville35岁，母亲Isabel Digges30岁。她于1514年与Thomas Baker在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1557年在英国肯特享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sackville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Sauqueville (Seine-Maritime) or Sacquenville (Eure).

variants.name: Sackwild
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Yiddish form sakwild, apparently meaning something like ‘game(bird), or venison, in a bag’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Sackville was born in 1494, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Sackville, was 35 and her mother, Isabel Digges, was 30. She married Thomas Baker in 1514, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1557, in Kent, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Sackville est née en 1494, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Sackville, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabel Digges, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Baker en 1514, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1557, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Sackville 1494 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Sackville 35 und ihre Mutter Isabel Digges 30. Sie hat 1514 in England Thomas Baker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1557 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Sackville è nata il nel 1494 nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Sackville, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Isabel Digges, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Baker nel 1514, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1557, nel Kent, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.Withyam, Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックス
ja.Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスブックハルスト ビー ウィスイハム
ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Sackvilleが1494年にイギリスイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Richard Sackvilleは35歳，母Isabel Diggesは30歳であった。1514年にイギリスでThomas Bakerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1557年にイギリスケントで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Sackville(이)가 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Sackville(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Digges(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1514년 영국에서 Thomas Baker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 영국 켄트에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Sackville nasceu em 1494, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Sackville, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Digges, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Baker em 1514, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1557, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Sackville родилась в 1494 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Sackville было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Digges, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Baker в 1514 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1557 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Sackville nació en 1494, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Sackville, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Isabel Digges, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Thomas Baker en 1514, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1557, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
